name: python3-dbus
title: python3-dbus
description:
simple interprocess messaging system (Python 3 interface)
D-Bus is a message bus, used for sending messages between applications.
Conceptually, it fits somewhere in between raw sockets and CORBA in
terms of complexity.
.
This package provides a Python 3 interface to D-Bus.
.
See the dbus description for more information about D-Bus in general.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-dbus because simple interprocess messaging system (Python 3 interface).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-dbus as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-dbus with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-dbus --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
